Title: The powerful GitHub folder most developers ignore
Author: GitHub
Description:
Did you know the .github folder can automate your CI/CD, create issue templates, and even control how GitHub Copilot writes code? In this Short, we break down why this often-overlooked folder is essential for managing your repositories. If you are part of an organization, you can even apply these rules across every project. Learn more in GitHub for Beginners season 3!

#GitHub #Repository #GitHubforBeginners
